content.full_text:
April 2, 1991

Ms. Colleen McGee  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Ms. McGee:

As required I filed a "Statement Of Economic Interests For Designated Employees" Form 730. I am required to file under categories A, D, F and G. As a result of my filing, a question has been raised regarding Category G, business position.

Presently I serve on two advisory boards: Desert Community Bank and San Bernardino County Central Credit Union. The advisory board makes recommendations to the board of directors which are non-binding. As an advisory board member I am not a director, officer, partner, trustee, employee, nor do I hold any position in management.

Today, at approximately 10:35 a.m., I spoke with Wayne at your office who advised that those positions should be placed on my statement of economic interests. With this in mind, I am requesting an opinion in writing as to whether serving as an advisory member to the above institutions constitutes a business position as described in Category G, recognizing that this is a non-paid type of position.

An opinion from the commission in a timely manner is requested.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Robert A. Sessions  
Chief of Police  
Barstow Police Department

RAS:bb

cc: Kay Vinson, Barstow City Clerk
